### Loyalist Alliance Mercenaries

These Mercenaries are acquired as Delegations via the Alliance Campaign Shop purchases.

#### 0-2 Enforcer Bodyguard (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the Imperial House Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Enforcer Bodyguard | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Enforcer Bodyguard is equipped withStandard Armour, a Stub Pistol, and a Disintegrator Gun (ignoring hand limitations). You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Stub Pistol.** 12”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Disintigtrator Gun.** 18”, IGNORE ARMOUR

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Enforcer Bodyguard is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Enforcer Bodyguard instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Enforcer Bodyguard.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Master of Coin (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Gelt: The Guild of Coin Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Master of Coin | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Master of Coin is equipped with a Laspistol, a Power Weapon, a Gun Skull, and a Displacer Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN-HAND ONLY  
* **Gun Skull.** 12”, ASSAULT, takes no hands, can be used to make an additional attack when the wielder takes the Shoot Action with another weapon.  
* **Displacer Field.** All attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Master of Coin can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Master of Coin’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Skinflint (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Gelt: The Guild of Coin Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skinflint | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Skinflint is equipped with Standard Armour, a Plasma Pistol, and a Cult Icon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Plasma Pistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
  * Normal Shot: ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss  
* **Cult Icon.** HELD. As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the carrier can attempt to heal itself or a friendly model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-2 Groveller (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Gelt: The Guild of Coin Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Groveller | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Groveller is equipped with a Close Combat Weapon and a Shotgun. One Groveller you recruit can be equipped with a Longlas instead of a Shotgun. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Shotgun.** 12”, \+1 DICE, SHOTGUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Longlas.** 48”, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Groveller is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Groveller instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Groveller.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-5 Guild Dreg (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Munda: The Iron Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Guild Dreg | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Guild Dreg can be equipped with up to 20 credits worth of weapons, armour, or equipment from any Armoury you have access to. You do not have to pay for this equipment, and it does not count towards your Credit Limit, but it does count towards LIMITS for battlekit. You can change this equipment however you like between battles, but you cannot give it to any other model.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Master Nautican (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Nautica: The Water Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Master Nautican | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Master Nautican is equipped with Standard Armour, a Needle Pistol, a Blade, a Stim-Slug Cache. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Needle Pistol.** 12”, GAS, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Stim-Slug Cache.** Once during each battle, at the start of any of its Activations, the equipped model can gain one of the following benefits. Once used, at the end of the Turn, the equipped model must roll on the INJURY table, with IGNORE ARMOUR and \-1 INJURY DICE.  
  * Remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from the model.  
  * The model gains \+2” movement speed and \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

**Abilities**

* **Bio-Booster.** The Master Nautican rolls twice on the Elite Trauma table, and you choose either result.  
* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Master Nautican can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Master Nautican’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins. 

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Subnautican (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Nautica: The Water Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Subnautican | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Subnautican is equipped with Power Armour and its Heavy Fists. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Heavy Fists.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Subnautican is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Subnautican instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Subnautican.

**Keywords**

#### 0-1 Pale Consort (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Pallidus: The Corpse Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Pale Consort | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Pale Consort is equipped with Standard Armour, Las Pistol, a Blade, and Filter Plugs. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Filter Plugs.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

**Abilities**

* **Medi-Skull.** The Pale Consort can take a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE and choose itself or one ally within 6”. On a success, you can remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the target, or if it is Down, you can instead allow it to stand up.  
* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Pale Consort can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Pale Consort’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins. 

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, GANGER, TOUGH

* **Gun Skull.** 12”, ASSAULT, takes no hands, can be used to make an additional attack when the wielder takes the Shoot Action with another weapon.  
* **Cult Icon.** HELD. As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the carrier can attempt to heal itself or a friendly model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.  
* **Filter Plugs.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

#### 0-2 Corpse Grinder (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Pallidus: The Corpse Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Corpse Grinder | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Corpse Grinder is equipped with a Chain Glaive. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Chain Glaive.** Melee, BLOCK, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED, VICIOUS 11

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Corpse Grinder is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Corpse Grinder instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Corpse Grinder.

**Keywords**

#### 0-1 Pyrocaen Lord (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Pyros: The Promethium Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Pyrocaen Lord | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Pyrocaen Lord is equipped with a Laspistol, a Shock Stave, Photon Flash Grenades, and a Refractor Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Shock Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Photon Flash Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, STUN, THROWN, can be used in melee using Ranged skill, in place of using melee weapons. Causes no injury, but does cause a STUN MARKER as an attack that uses the STUN Keyword. Instead, on a hit, the target cannot make attacks against enemies that Retreat from it until the end of the current Turn.  
* **Refractor Field.** The equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Abilities**

* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Pyrocaen Lord can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Pyrocaen Lord’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Pyromagir (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Pyros: The Promethium Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Pyromagir | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Pyromagir is equipped with a Flamer, Photon Flash Grenades, a Cult Icon (ignoring hand limitations), and a Refractor Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Flamer.** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, FIRE, TWO-HANDED  
* **Photon Flash Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, STUN, THROWN, can be used in melee using Ranged skill, in place of using melee weapons. Causes no injury, but does cause a STUN MARKER as an attack that uses the STUN Keyword. Instead, on a hit, the target cannot make attacks against enemies that Retreat from it until the end of the current Turn.  
* **Cult Icon.** HELD. As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the carrier can attempt to heal itself or a friendly model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.  
* **Refractor Field.** The equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Chain Lord (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Sanguis: The Slave Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Chain Lord | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Chain Lord is equipped with Standard Armour, a Stim-Slug Cache, and your choice of: a Chain Glaive, or a Chainblade and a Shockwhip. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Chain Glaive.** Melee, BLOCK, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED, VICIOUS 11  
* **Chain Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Shockwhip.** Melee, STUN, WHIP 3”  
* **Stim-Slug Cache.** Once during each battle, at the start of any of its Activations, the equipped model can gain one of the following benefits. Once used, at the end of the Turn, the equipped model must roll on the INJURY table, with IGNORE ARMOUR and \-1 INJURY DICE.  
  * Remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from the model.  
  * The model gains \+2” movement speed and \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

**Abilities**

* **Bio-Booster.** The Chain Lord rolls twice on the Elite Trauma table, and you choose either result.  
* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Chain Lord can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Chain Lord’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Shackleman (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Sanguis: The Slave Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Shackleman | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Shackleman is equipped with a Harpoon Launcher, a Shock Baton, a Cult Icon (ignoring hand limitations). You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Harpoon Launcher.** 18”, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D6” directly towards the wielder. (Note that the Shackleman is not STRONG.)  
* **Shock Baton.** Melee, STUN  
* **Cult Icon.** HELD. As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the carrier can attempt to heal itself or a friendly model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-2 Pit Fighter (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Mercator Sanguis: The Slave Guild Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Pit Fighter | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Pit Fighter is equipped with a Chain Glaive and a Stim-Slug Cache. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Chain Glaive.** Melee, BLOCK, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED, VICIOUS 11  
* **Stim-Slug Cache.** Once during each battle, at the start of any of its Activations, the equipped model can gain one of the following benefits. Once used, at the end of the Turn, the equipped model must roll on the INJURY table, with IGNORE ARMOUR and \-1 INJURY DICE.  
  * Remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from the model.  
  * The model gains \+2” movement speed and \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Pit Fighter is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Pit Fighter instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Pit Fighter.

**Keywords**  
GANGER
